articles.title: Ebola outbreak in DR Congo could become worst in history, Africa CDC warns - Al Jazeera
articles.description: The ⁠number of confirmed cases in ⁠the country has increased to 837, including 196 deaths.
articles.content: The current Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) could become deadlier than the worst outbreak on record, which killed more than 11,000 people, says the head of Africas Centres fo… [+2157 chars]
